title: Hostinger VPS runs Hermes and Supabase containers for MVP
summary: Sets the MVP deployment baseline as a single Hostinger VPS running Hermes and Supabase in separate Docker containers, deferring per-user containers.
notes: Path (docs/adr/) and numbered filename (0003-) plus a single chosen infrastructure decision with trade-off rationale make this a clear ADR.
